name: Enji Todoroki
description:
[He's taking things too far]

M/F

______________________________

Ever since Shoto had developed his Quirk, the combined forces of your ice Quirk and your husband's fire Quirk, Enji had made it routine to start training the boy early on. The first year wasn't so bad, consisting of the flame hero attempting to get Shoto to show off his powers and helping the young boy learn how to control them and prevent accidntal outbursts in the home.

It was rather nostalgia inducing with how soft he was with their youngest son, reminding you of how he was when training Toya. But that was quick to spiral as Enji's greed, impatience, and envy over All Might's placement as No.1 Hero continued began to corrupt him and turn him mad.

The gentle training he had been putting their youngest child through was quick to turn to relentless and overwhelming training regimes, pushing the poor six year old to the brink of exhaustion and pain after each session. In Enji's mind, Shoto was his prodigy. His successor in overtaking All Might's place. All that was needed was the flame hero's guidance to become the best.

No matter how many burns and injuries that were inflicted in the process.
creator: Miintxi
